name: Sonatype Nexus Repository
description: Monitor user access, role-based access controls, repository inventory, and security scanning configuration in Sonatype Nexus Repository Manager

credentialFields.label: Server URL
credentialFields.helpText: Full URL to your Nexus Repository instance (e.g., https://nexus.example.com)

credentialFields.label: Username
credentialFields.helpText: Username with admin or nx-admin role for read access to security and repository APIs

credentialFields.label: Password
credentialFields.helpText: Password or user token for the above username

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all users in Nexus Repository and verifies each active user has roles assigned for proper access control

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Reviews all roles configured in Nexus Repository and verifies each role has privileges or nested roles defined

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Lists all repositories configured in Nexus Repository Manager to provide a complete inventory of artifact stores

checks.name: Secure Code
checks.description: Checks whether Sonatype IQ Server (Repository Firewall) is configured and enabled for vulnerability scanning of components, and verifies audit status on proxy repositories
